relations.subject: 皇家琵鷺
relations.evidence: The royal spoonbill (Platalea regia), also known as the black-billed spoonbill lives in intertidal flats and shallows of fresh and saltwater wetlands in Australia, New Zealand, Indonesia, Papua New Guinea, and the Solomon Islands
relations.object_summary: 浅水、沼泽与植被斑块组成的高生产力生态系统。

relations.subject: 皇家琵鷺
relations.evidence: The royal spoonbill (Platalea regia), also known as the black-billed spoonbill lives in intertidal flats and shallows of fresh and saltwater wetlands in Australia, New Zealand, Indonesia, Papua New Guinea, and the Solomon Islands
relations.object_summary: 迁飞水鸟高度依赖的滨海觅食带。

relations.subject: 皇家琵鷺
relations.evidence: The royal spoonbill lives in wetlands and feeds on crustaceans, fish and small insects by sweeping its bill from side to side
relations.object_summary: 浅水、沼泽与植被斑块组成的高生产力生态系统。
